summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Product Identity & Deduplication system. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Public weekly report page displaying products correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status and database connected
GET /api/ingestion/dedup/stats returns correct canonical/merged product counts
POST /api/ingestion/dedup/run returns 401 without API key
POST /api/ingestion/dedup/run returns 401 with invalid API key
POST /api/ingestion/dedup/run?dry_run=true with valid API key works correctly
GET /api/ingestion/dedup/history returns deduplication run history
GET /api/products returns only canonical products by default (is_canonical != False)
GET /api/products?canonical_only=false returns all products including merged
GET /api/products metadata includes canonical_count, multi_source_count, avg_confidence_score
Canonical products have required fields: canonical_id, canonical_confidence, contributing_sources
Multi-source canonical products have source_data array with source details
GET /api/dashboard/daily-winners returns products with correct structure
Daily winners have valid trend_stage values (rising, stable, etc.)
Daily winners have validation_result and validation_label fields
GET /api/reports/ returns list of available reports
Reports have valid metadata, summary, and public_preview structure
Reports API returns latest report indicators (weekly/monthly)
Weekly report public_preview contains top_5_products
Dedup stats canonical count matches products API
Merged products (is_canonical=False) excluded from default products query
critical_code_review_comments: Product deduplication using Union-Find algorithm in identity_service.py - correctly groups products
Merger preserves source-level data provenance in source_data array
Products API correctly filters using is_canonical: {$ne: False} for canonical_only=true
Dedup run endpoint properly protected with X-API-Key authentication
Canonical confidence calculated from multiple source scores + diversity bonus

success_rate.frontend: Public weekly report page working correctly

seed_data_creation: None - tested existing dedup results: 54 total products, 42 canonical, 12 merged, 6 multi-source
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Identity & Deduplication system fully working. Key endpoints: GET /api/ingestion/dedup/stats (no auth), POST /api/ingestion/dedup/run (requires X-API-Key), GET /api/products (canonical_only=true by default). Public weekly report at /reports/weekly-winning-products. 6 duplicate groups were found and merged creating 42 canonical products.

features_verified.dedup_history: Working - shows run history with metrics
features_verified.products_canonical_only: Working - excludes merged products by default
features_verified.daily_winners: Working - returns ranked products with validation labels
features_verified.reports_list: Working - lists weekly and monthly reports
features_verified.public_weekly_report: Working - displays top 5 products with trend data
